{{Quote|Captain Averen of Monarch has sent a truce-byte out to everyone.|Sirlul to Admiral Ackbar|<ref name="WG" />}}
'''Averen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] fleet officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial]] starfleet who served as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Monarch (Star Destroyer)|''Monarch'']] during the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Seizure of Coruscant]], during which he surrendered to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] after sustaining serious damage.

==Biography==
Averen, and his ''Monarch'', did not have a formidable reputation. As a result, [[Director of Imperial Intelligence|Director]] of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Ysanne Isard]] chose the ''Monarch'' to defend the planet during the Seizure of Coruscant along with the Star Destroyer [[Triumph (Victory-class)|''Triumph'']], which had a similarly unimpressive reputation.<ref name="WG" />

Isard wanted Coruscant to fall to the Rebel hands so that the New Republic would find its [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] resources devastated by an outbreak of the [[krytos virus]]. Therefore, it is likely Isard knew the ''Monarch'' and ''Triumph'' would be either captured or destroyed during the battle. She essentially left them, along with Averen and his crew, for dead, choosing to instead relocate the superior Star Destroyers [[Emperor's Will (Victory-class)|''Emperor's Will'']] and [[Imperator (Victory-class)|''Imperator'']].<ref name="WG" />

During the battle, the ''Monarch'' lost its shields after taking heavy fire by the New Republic's Star Destroyers ''[[Emancipator]]'' and [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']], [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Cruiser]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']]. The ''Triumph'' sustained even more damage and was eventually captured by the Mon Calamari Cruiser ''[[Mon Remonda]]''.<ref name="WG" />

Shortly following the ''Triumph''{{'s}} capture, Averen contacted ''Home One'' and surrendered. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] accepted and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Sirlul]] negotiated the terms of the surrender, which were either unconditional or had insignificant conditions.<ref name="WG" />

Following the battle and surrender, the ''Monarch'' was added to the New Republic fleet.<ref name="WG" />
